title: My Work filter tasks assigned to Teams
excerpt: We have just 1 workspace for our small team. Our 5 users are part of a Team, and some tasks are assigned to the entire Team (not all 5 users individually). In the My Work tab, it would be very helpful to be able to view …

posts.author: bryce-thewell (Bryce K)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have just 1 workspace for our small team. Our 5 users are part of a Team, and some tasks are assigned to the entire Team (not all 5 users individually). In the My Work tab, it would be very helpful to be able to view tasks assigned to me AND assigned to the Team so they don’t get lost in the mix of Boards.

Currently, if I add a filter to My Work to view things assigned to the Team, it shows EVERYTHING assigned to EVERYONE within that team, not just tasks assigned to the Team itself.

Is there a way to do this currently? Perhaps creating a separate Dashboard for these kinds of Tasks? Thanks!
